mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_follow (follower_id, followee_id, create_time) VALUES (#{followerId}, #{followeeId}, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_follow WHERE follower_id = #{followerId} AND followee_id = #{followeeId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM user_follow WHERE follower_id = #{followerId} AND followee_id = #{followeeId}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM user_follow WHERE follower_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM user_follow WHERE followee_id = #{userId}
SELECT u.id, u.username, u.nickname, u.email, u.create_time, u.update_time FROM user u INNER JOIN user_follow f ON f.followee_id = u.id AND f.follower_id = #{userId} ORDER BY f.create_time DESC
SELECT u.id, u.username, u.nickname, u.email, u.create_time, u.update_time FROM user u INNER JOIN user_follow f ON f.follower_id = u.id AND f.followee_id = #{userId} ORDER BY f.create_time DESC
